steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: "The ______ of sleek, contemporary elements and traditional organic materials in a single design" — the blank names what happens when two contrasting things are brought together into one design. It must mean combining or merging into a whole.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The [word] needs to mean the act of combining two different elements into one unified design. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — synthesis: combining distinct elements into a unified whole — exactly describes merging contemporary metal and traditional organic materials into a single design. ✓
  • Choice B — designation: a name or label assigned to something — labeling elements doesn't describe how they are combined in a design. ✗
  • Choice C — analysis: breaking something into parts to examine it — the opposite of combining; analysis separates rather than unifies. ✗
  • Choice D — diffusion: spreading out or dispersing — this implies scattering, not combining two things into one design. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
